PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRASNY, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,675.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,675.00, STATUTORY COST OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KRASNY.
